meta.title: Rank the Hands
meta.description: Determine which of two hands wins on a given board.

blocks.content:
## Rank the Hands

Two players. One board. Who wins? Compare the two hands and pick the winner. Remember — you use the best five cards from the seven available (two hole cards + five board cards). Keep at it and this will become second nature!

blocks.title: Hand Ranking Drill
blocks.instructions: Two players each hold two hole cards. A shared board is dealt. Determine which player wins, or if it's a split pot.
